name: IT-Tools
description: An array of handy online tools for developers
compose:
name: slashnode-ittools
services:
  app:
    image: corentinth/it-tools:2024.10.22-7ca5933
    container_name: ittools
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:8786:80
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
